/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o  -L/home/amovlab-z410/ROS1_Project_Learning/demo05_ws/build_isolated/urdf01_rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/amovlab-z410/ROS1_Project_Learning/demo05_ws/build_isolated/urdf01_rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -lpthread
